decks.name: Bones of the Human Body
decks.description: The major named bones of the human skeleton, from the skull and spine to the hands and feet. Read the description, type the bone; extras add location, landmarks, and how many bones make up each region.

decks.name: Major Muscles and Their Actions
decks.description: The major skeletal muscles you can name and feel, grouped head to toe, with the main movement each one produces. Extras give location and a memorable role for muscles like the masseter, latissimus dorsi, and sartorius.

decks.name: The 12 Cranial Nerves
decks.description: The 12 cranial nerves drilled both ways: number to name and name to number, plus what each one does and whether it is sensory, motor, or both. Includes the two classic medical-school mnemonics.

decks.name: The Human Brain
decks.description: A tour of the brain's anatomy: the four lobes and what they do, the cerebellum and brainstem, the thalamus and hypothalamus, the limbic system, and the membranes and fluid that protect it all.

decks.name: The Human Heart
decks.description: How the heart is built and how blood moves through it: the four chambers, the four valves, the great vessels, the conduction system, and the full path of circulation as a step-by-step sequence.
